summary: Clear audience tape captures a solid show with standout moments like Stella Blue, The Other One and a scorching Scarlet Begonias/Estimated Prophet stretch.
review: The recording is an audience capture that most listeners find pleasant and well‑balanced, delivering the full energy of the performance. Fans repeatedly point to the second set – especially Stella Blue, The Other One, Scarlet Begonias and Estimated Prophet – as highlights, making this a generally enjoyable show despite one outlier review giving a low rating.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers praise both the musical performance and the tape quality; only a single anomalous low‑star review drags the average down slightly.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as clear, ear‑friendly and well balanced; no major dropouts or distortion reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set is repeatedly highlighted as the high point; overall pacing and song transitions are praised.
